mapper.select: SELECT post.post_pk AS postPk, post.post_title AS postTitle, post.post_content AS postContent, post.post_created_at AS postCreatedAt, post.post_updated_at AS postUpdatedAt, member.member_id AS writerId, member.member_pk AS writerPk FROM post INNER JOIN member ON post.writer_pk = member.member_pk WHERE post_pk = #{postPk} AND post_deleted = false
SELECT CEIL(COUNT(*)::numeric /#{maxPostCount}) AS maxPageCount FROM post WHERE post_deleted = false

SELECT post.post_pk AS postPk, post.post_title AS postTitle, member.member_id AS writerId, post.post_created_at AS postCreatedAt, post.post_view_count AS postViewCount FROM post INNER JOIN member ON post.writer_pk = member.member_pk WHERE post.post_deleted = false ORDER BY post.post_created_at DESC, post.post_pk DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE post_pk=#{postPk} AND post_deleted = false
UPDATE post SET post_deleted = true WHERE post_pk=#{postPk} AND post_deleted = false RETURNING post_pk AS postPk, post_deleted AS postDeleted

UPDATE post SET post_title=#{postTitle}, post_content=#{postContent}, post_updated_at=now() WHERE post_pk=#{postPk} AND post_deleted=false RETURNING post_pk AS postPk, post_title AS postTitle, post_content AS postContent
